meta.title: Lev Intake: Harnesses, Skill Programs, and Topological Memory
meta.description: Deep video and paper intake with Lev positioning, overlap analysis, verified P0/P1/P2 spikes, and implementation plan.

props.title: Harnesses, Skill Programs, and Topological Memory
props.subtitle: Six late-May 2026 videos and papers translated into Lev architecture, verified workshop spikes, and a promotion plan.

props.content: The useful signal across the batch is not that the LLM got smarter. It is that the system around the LLM owns validity, repair, memory structure, proof, and authority. Lev is already pointed this way; the verified spikes show the first contracts that should be promoted next.

props.label: Thesis
props.title: The LLM Proposes; The System Governs
props.subtitle: The batch is useful when translated into control boundaries, not copied as hype.

props.content: The LLM remains the proposal engine. FlowMind, harness, eval, context graph, memory, event receipts, and human gates own the parts that make the proposal executable, repairable, auditable, and safe to promote.

LLM proposal
  -> skill-program predicate
  -> typed intervention delta
  -> runtime harness repair/block/redirect
  -> eval proof for necessity + preservation + adequacy
  -> graph/memory source-anchored context
  -> event/receipt trail
  -> AgentPing/HITL when policy requires human authority

props.label: Overlap
props.title: Venn Of The Batch
props.subtitle: Control, memory, benchmark proof, and human authority all converge on the same Lev contract layer.

props.caption: Six sources converge on Lev's control and proof boundary.
props.content:
flowchart TB
  Control["Deterministic Control\nLife-Harness + HASP + AutoResearchClaw"]
  Memory["Topological Memory\nSAGE + H-Mem"]
  Bench["Benchmark / Execution Proof\nHerculean + AutoResearchClaw"]
  HITL["Human Authority\nAutoResearchClaw + Life-Harness + Lev"]
  Lev["Lev Integration Core\nFlowMind predicates\nHarness repair\nEval proof\nContext graph retrieval\nAgentPing gates"]

  Control --> Lev
  Memory --> Lev
  Bench --> Lev
  HITL --> Lev

rows.memory: SAGE writer feedback, H-Mem scope planner
rows.lev: Predicates must be replayable, typed, and evidence-backed.

rows.memory: Graph write candidates and retrieval scopes
rows.lev: Every intervention needs before/after delta plus proof facts.

rows.control: Runtime traces, numeric registries, commit artifacts
rows.lev: Receipts and source refs are not optional metadata.
AgentPing is policy surface, not fallback UI.

props.label: Sources
props.title: Per-Video And Paper Breakdown
props.subtitle: Each row links the paper signal to the Lev owner and implementation posture.

rows.paper_signal: Runtime interface transformation improves frozen-model behavior across most tested settings.
rows.video_correction: This is interface adaptation, not magic intelligence leaving the model.

rows.paper_signal: CoPilot modes, 23-stage workflow, numeric registry, SmartReview, and SmartPaper loops beat full-auto baselines.
rows.video_correction: The autonomous scientist still depends on human co-pilot gates.

rows.paper_signal: Procedural Functions use should_activate + execute and typed intervention modes.
rows.video_correction: Skill programs are executable contracts, not longer markdown skills.

rows.paper_signal: Source-anchored graph writer plus reader feedback improves multi-hop retrieval, with heavy GFM caveats.
rows.video_correction: Not a memory.md replacement; it is graph writer/reader feedback with reward design.

rows.paper_signal: Temporal tree plus entity graph anchors; tree ablation hurts most, graph second.
rows.video_correction: The implementable object is tree/graph/planner/scorer, not a vague manifold.

rows.paper_signal: Framework control changes outcomes for the same backbone; structural error rate can dominate.
rows.video_correction: Use as benchmark/eval evidence, not finance advice or a single leaderboard.

props.label: Concepts
props.title: Concepts Worth Importing
props.subtitle: These are the durable concepts after removing paper-specific machinery.

props.label: P1
props.title: Runtime Interface Repair
props.content: The harness detects environment-facing syntax failures and applies deterministic repairs before execution. The model output stays unchanged; the receipt proves the delta.

props.label: P0
props.title: Skill Program Semantics
props.content: `should_activate` becomes a FlowMind-owned predicate. `execute` becomes a typed intervention delta. Eval scores necessity, preservation, and evidence.

props.label: HITL
props.title: CoPilot Gate Modes
props.content: AutoResearchClaw is strongest when human gates are deliberate. Lev should encode human authority classes in policy, not leave them as ad hoc pauses.

props.label: SAGE
props.title: Source-Anchored Graph Feedback
props.content: Graph memory writes should be candidates until reader feedback and proof scoring admit them. No direct LLM graph mutation.

props.label: H-Mem
props.title: Temporal Tree + Entity Anchors
props.content: Tree summaries handle time horizon; graph anchors handle relation paths. Retrieval scope should choose SHORT, LONG, or MIXED under a token budget.

props.label: Herculean
props.title: Framework/Model Matrix
props.content: Benchmark rows must bind framework, model, memory policy, retrieval policy, and case. Structural errors need their own metric.

props.label: Lev Position
props.title: Current vs Ideal
props.subtitle: Lev already has the right planes. The gaps are contract and proof shape, not high-level direction.

rows.current: Control/policy plane with declarations and gates.
rows.ideal: Owns executable predicates, intervention policy, and HITL gate modes.
Canonicalizes, repairs, blocks, or redirects invalid environment-facing action syntax.
Scores intervention necessity, preservation, semantic adequacy, and structural errors.

rows.current: Memory consolidation, spreading activation, and skill evolution.
rows.ideal: Topology-aware retrieval projection with graph/tree evidence chains.

rows.current: Entity graph, claims, links, traversal, context projection.
rows.ideal: Source-anchored graph paths feed memory read-model proof without owning policy.
Policy-driven authority mode for ambiguity, risk, and core promotion decisions.

props.label: Verified Spikes
props.title: P0 / P1 / P2 Proof Results
props.subtitle: The workshop proofs are small, deterministic, and isolated from core package APIs.

rows.proof: Four deterministic cases: inject_context, block, request_human, noop. Repeated runs produce identical hashes.
Two invalid actions repaired, one valid action passed through, one ambiguous action blocked. model_output_changed is false.
Three fixture queries: topology recall 1.0 vs baseline recall 0.5, provenance coverage present, token budgets respected.

props.label: Contracts
props.title: Promotion Contract Shapes
props.subtitle: These are not final package APIs. They are the stable fields proven by the spikes.

props.label: Implementation
props.title: Overarching Implementation Plan
props.subtitle: Promote from proof to owner packages only after contract review.

props.label: Phase 1
props.title: Workshop Proof Layer
props.content: Complete. P0, P1, and P2 produce proof JSON and passing deterministic tests.

props.label: Phase 2
props.title: Contract Consolidation
props.content: Review repeated stable fields. Keep spike-only helpers local. Promote only types with clear owners and second-consumer pressure.

props.label: Phase 3
props.title: Owner Package Landing
props.content: FlowMind predicate declarations, harness repair receipts, eval intervention proof, evolve-memory topology projection, context-graph path read port if proven.

props.label: Phase 4
props.title: Benchmark And HITL Hardening
props.content: Add framework/model matrix evals, structural error sensors, semantic adequacy proof, and AgentPing authority modes.

props.label: Gaps
props.title: Remaining Gaps And Risks
props.subtitle: The spikes prove contract viability. They do not yet justify broad core refactors.

rows.gap: Semantic adequacy proof is still underdeveloped.
rows.risk: Syntactic proof can certify empty or misleading work.
rows.next: Add an eval follow-on that scores evidence sufficiency and answer deducibility.

rows.gap: HITL gate modes are not unified.
rows.risk: Human review remains manual and inconsistent across ambiguity, risk, and promotion.
rows.next: Define AgentPing/FlowMind authority classes for core promotion, proof conflict, and policy uncertainty.

rows.gap: Memory privacy and deletion are outside P2.
rows.risk: Durable personal/project memory can become unsafe without edit/delete/audit semantics.
rows.next: Keep topology spike non-durable until a memory governance gate exists.

rows.risk: Model, framework, memory, and output-contract failures get conflated.
rows.next: Add a matrix-eval slice with structural error rate, memory/search controls, and artifact proof.

props.title: Source And Proof Index
